zh.lifeSummary: 當Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV於大約1173年出生時，他的父親Guðrøðr Óláfsson34歲，母親Findguala Nic Lochlainn24歲。他和Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross至少有9個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1237年5月12日享年65歲，埋葬在曼島盧申 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV于大约1173年出生时，他的父亲Guðrøðr Óláfsson34岁，母亲Findguala Nic Lochlainn24岁。他和Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross至少有9个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1237年5月12日享年65岁，埋葬在曼岛盧申 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Olaf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements anu ‘ancestor’ + leifr ‘heir, descendant’. St Olaf , King of Norway ( 995–1030 ), aided the spread of Christianity in his kingdom. The name was introduced to Britain before the Norman Conquest, but modern use as a given name in the English-speaking world originated in America, where it was taken by recent Scandinavian immigrants.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Odhar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Warwickshire): variant of   Odom  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Odom
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘red’ in Hebrew), which was the byname of Esau. It was given to him because he was born covered with red hair (Genesis 25:25) or because he sold his birthright for a bowl of red lentil soup. This was frequently used as a given name in medieval Scotland, where it was taken to represent a variant of   Adam .  It is occasionally bestowed in modern times by parents with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV was born about 1173, his father, Guðrøðr Óláfsson, was 34 and his mother, Findguala Nic Lochlainn, was 24. He had at least 9 sons and 2 daughters with Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross. He died on 12 May 1237, at the age of 65, and was buried in Rushen Abbey, Isle of Man.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV est né environ 1173, son père, Guðrøðr Óláfsson, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Findguala Nic Lochlainn, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles avec Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1237, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Rushen Abbey, Île de Man.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV um 1173 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guðrøðr Óláfsson 34 und seine Mutter Findguala Nic Lochlainn 24. Er hatte mit Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Mai 1237 im Alter von 65 Jahren und wurde in Rushen Abbey, Isle of Man begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV è nato il circa 1173, il suo padre, Guðrøðr Óláfsson, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Findguala Nic Lochlainn, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie con Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross. Morì il 12 maggio 1237, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Rushen Abbey, Isola di Man.

ja.Hebrides, Scotland: スコットランドヘブリズ
ja.Rushen Abbey, Isle of Man: マン島ルシェン アビー
ja.lifeSummary: Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IVが約1173年に生まれた時，父Guðrøðr Óláfssonは34歳，母Findguala Nic Lochlainnは24歳であった。彼はChristina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Rossとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1237年5月12日に65歳で死去し，マン島ルシェン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV(이)가 대략 1173년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guðrøðr Óláfsson(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Findguala Nic Lochlainn(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 5월 12일 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 맨섬 러셰 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV nasceu aproximadamente 1173, seu pai, Guðrøðr Óláfsson, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Findguala Nic Lochlainn, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas com Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1237, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Rushen Abbey, Ilha de Man.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV родился около 1173 г., его отцу по имени Guðrøðr Óláfsson было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Findguala Nic Lochlainn, 24. У него было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери от Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross. Он умер 12 мая 1237 г. в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности рушен эбби, Остров Мэн.

sm.1176-1177: mai le 1176 e o'o I le 1177

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV nació aproximadamente 1173, su papá, Guðrøðr Óláfsson, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Findguala Nic Lochlainn, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas con Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1237, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Rushen Abbey, Isla de Man.
